title: Sniffer +
description: this mod upgrade the sniffer mob so it becomes more useful with new plants,drops end a few more itens
body:
ATETION MOD IS BEING REDONE AS "trails of the past"

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/k6UkzrRs5Ho" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

The sniffer is a great mob in concept but the way that mojang handle them was very disappointing

![Mod icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e526fb839a9229edeecb182f96cd042f3905d2b.png)

With sniffer + the sniffer becomes a better mob !, now the sniffer can drop his fur, this come with an all new sniffer fur family of blocks, and new changes not also made to the own sniffer loot but also to his digging loot table with all 6 new itens being 4 new decoration plants(shurb,ivy bud,blue iris,rose), 1 new food scource(ancient bloom) and a new fuel(fosfor) !

Plants - - -
Ivy bud is a plant that open when touch, when open it will light up, no other uses -
Shurb is a bush type block, no uses

![Ivy bud and the shurb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a7ae08dd6f8e8ab6bf85753a58d47a97c562fd1.png)

Rose and the iris are inspired by the old poppy and the blue rose from old pocket edition

Food Scource - - -
Ancient Bloom is a hanging vine type block that can be place under blocks and can grown a new food they also can have their growing stop by right click with shears - ancient berry are a new food that are less filling than bread but with remove all potions effects and existingishe the player

![All ancient bloom stages](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4512d55dc89cf4b140d0c029b9c8394ae5307c2.png)

Fuel - - - 
fosfor is a more effective fuel than coal tha burns 2x as long also can be used in making all new decoritive blocks

![Fosfor family of blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46a4e2339db3543983a88218d21df040f43e65d7.png)
